gloss_en: Our friend has come to the village.
notes: Labourdin 'jin' (come) and 'adiskide'; trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'herrira' per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The apple is sweet and beautiful.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'sagarra' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: It is cold today in the mountains.
notes: Laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza' and the continental laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The small dogs are in the house.
notes: Labourdin 'txipi' (small); post-alveolar affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txakur', 'etxean' per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: I still drink cold water.
notes: Labourdin 'oraino'; ⟨h⟩ [h] and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza', sandhi 'hotza edaten' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The sea is near from here.
notes: Apical affricate ⟨ts⟩ [ts̺] 'itsasoa' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'hurbil', 'hemendik' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The rooster is singing in the morning.
notes: Continental spelling 'oilar'; trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'oilarra' and vowel-junction 'kantari ari' per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The child is sick in bed.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'gaixoa' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'haurra', 'ohean' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: My heart is pounding.
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'bihotza' and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The lady is reading the book.
notes: Laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'irakurtzen'; vowel-junction 'anderea liburua'? coverage per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

sentence: Onddo eder bat hartu dugu oihanean.
ipa: onɟo edeɾ bat haɾtu duɡu oihanean
gloss_en: We took a fine mushroom in the wood.
notes: Labourdin 'oihan' (wood); palatal ⟨dd⟩ [ɟ] 'onddo' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'hartu', 'oihanean' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: A drop has fallen to the ground.
notes: Continental allative '-rat'; palatal ⟨tt⟩ [c] 'ttantta' and trill 'lurrerat' per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: A little mouse runs off.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xagu' and palatal ⟨tt⟩ [c] 'ttipi' per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: You must wash your hand.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'eskua' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'behar' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: Let us speak together.
notes: Labourdin 'mintzatu' (speak); laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'mintza' and trill 'elkarrekin' per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The salt and pepper are on the table.
notes: Labourdin 'biper', 'mahain'; laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'gatza' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'mahainean' per oyharçabal2003; general phonology per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The tree is losing its leaves.
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'zuhaitzak' and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'galtzen' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The girl and the boy walk together.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'neska' and laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'dabiltza' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The castle stands on the little hill.
notes: Laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'gaztelua' and post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'mendixkaren' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: When do the village festivals begin?
notes: Labourdin 'besta' (festival); ⟨h⟩ [h] 'herriko', 'hasten' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per hualde2018_aspiration.
